result.stdout:
Description:
  JD.AI Gateway Daemon — run as a system service with auto-updates

Usage:
  JD.AI.Daemon [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  run              Start the daemon (default when no subcommand is given)
  install          Install as a Windows Service or systemd unit
  uninstall        Remove the system service
  start            Start the installed service
  stop             Stop the running service
  status           Show service status, version, and uptime
  update           Check for and apply updates from NuGet
  logs             Show recent service logs
  bridge <action>  Manage OpenClaw bridge mode and enablement (status|enable|disable|passthrough)
  dashboard        Open the dashboard in the default browser

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  run              Start the daemon (default when no subcommand is given)
  install          Install as a Windows Service or systemd unit
  uninstall        Remove the system service
  start            Start the installed service
  stop             Stop the running service
  status           Show service status, version, and uptime
  update           Check for and apply updates from NuGet
  logs             Show recent service logs
  bridge <action>  Manage OpenClaw bridge mode and enablement (status|enable|disable|passthrough)
  dashboard        Open the dashboard in the default browser

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage OpenClaw bridge mode and enablement (status|enable|disable|passthrough)

Usage:
  JD.AI.Daemon bridge [<action>] [options]

Arguments:
  <action>  Action: status, enable, disable, passthrough

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Check for and apply updates from NuGet

Usage:
  JD.AI.Daemon update [options]

Options:
  --check-only    Only check — don't apply the update
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
